meta.name: Regular Everday Normal Guys

format.vp: Each week: +2 for the head-to-head win, plus a scoring bonus (top-4 = +2, middle-4 = +1, bottom-4 = 0). Max 4 VP/week.

meta.note: Standings & seeding use Victory Points over a 14-week regular season. Playoffs: top-2 seeds bye, seeds 3-6 play a Week-15 score shootout (top 2 advance), then a 2-week cumulative-score final crowns the champion.
